regression_prevention: Harness now requires valid fixture ALLOW and invalid fixture DENY with returncode 0 for both expected outcomes.
repair: Restrict default-style scan to declaration/intent fields plus explicit note.
Treat --expect DENY as successful when the decision is DENY.
root_cause: Validator scanned anti-pattern/promotion-blocker strings as declaration strings.
CLI returned nonzero for an expected DENY, causing negative fixture pass logic to fail.
